cards.front: What is the Autocorrelation Function (ACF) used for?
cards.back: To measure the correlation between a time series and time lagged versions of itself
A representation of the power spectral density of a time series
The process of estimating the power spectral density of a time series from its samples

cards.front: What is the assumption of spectral estimation?
cards.back: The assumption that the time series is stationary and that the autocorrelation function is a finite sum of exponentially decaying sinusoids

cards.front: What does a stationary time series have?
cards.back: A constant mean and a constant covariance matrix
